description: A clinical neuropsychology postdoctoral researcher needs to analyze Probabilistic Reversal Learning (PRL) data from 19 participants located at ~/pebl/data/reversal_learning_data.csv (columns: participant_id, trial, phase, choice, feedback, correct_stimulus, reversal_trial). Generate a JSON report at ~/pebl/analysis/reversal_report.json containing Win-Stay rates (trials 2–120), Lose-Shift rates (trials 2–120), acquisition accuracy, reversal accuracy, perseverative errors, and trials to criterion post-reversal. The report must include a 'participants' list with individual IDs and their calculated metrics, or an exclusion flag with a reason if the participant shows a mechanical alternating response pattern. Additionally,

metadata.contamination_description: Perfect alternation (A, B, A, B) regardless of feedback, resulting in ~0.0 Win-Stay
metadata.data_source: Domain-specific generative Rescorla-Wagner RL model simulation for Probabilistic Reversal Learning
